title: Set default network driver for APIv2 networks
body:
Recent changes in networking require that the cni network driver be set.
If the user provides no driver, we set the driver to the
defaultnetworkdriver which currently is "bridge".

Fixes: #8294

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

-->

LGTM, and the APIv2 test is passing, yay! Thank you!
Currently we don't support a default network for containers.  Should this be added to containers.conf?
We should already have one for CNI, at least?

```
       default_network="podman"

       The network name of the default CNI network to attach pods to.
```
